This Week in Chagrin Falls — JoJo's · Bar Fuoco · Lola's · 17 River
Week of May 18 – May 25, 2026
May 21 – 25, 2026
Blossom Time is here. The village is full.
Four days of carnival, balloons, run, parade — plus Kenston & Solon graduations Thursday and Memorial Day Monday. The biggest weekend of the season.
★ Blossom Time Schedule

5/21

Opening night · Balloon Glow at the High School after dark

★

🚗
Parking & Commute — Read Before Your Shift
Riverside Park parking is gone Thursday through Monday. Arrive 30 minutes earlier than usual every shift, all weekend. Sunday 5/24 — Main Street closes at 1:45pm for the parade · be on property before noon or you will not get through. Carpool when you can. Park where your manager tells you — not in guest spots.
Blossom Time + Grad Night + Memorial Day. Engage every soul. Be 1% better.
